curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch changes the default value of allow_pickle from True to False in three places: numpy.lib.npyio.load(), numpy.lib.npyio.NpzFile.__init__(), and numpy.lib.format.read_array(). Added NpzFile.__init__ as a separate location since it is a public API that can be constructed directly with the same vulnerable default. Only 2 non-test source files were modified (npyio.py, format.py), so the patch is not noisy. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 per updated guidelines. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed — CWE-502 maps directly and the patch addresses unsafe pickle deserialization defaults.
